title: Latent class: fit and finalize in one call
summary: Fit a latent class model and write all exports in a single command.

title: Latent class: 3-segment fit-finalize with soft start
summary: Fit a 3-class model with soft-start annealing and write exports in one call.
oce_text:
[["model-mnl-lc::fit-finalize"]]
input = "coded_long.csv"
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "pilot_k3"
segments = 3
use_soft_start = true
softness_start = 5.0
softness_end = 1.0
soft_start_iterations = 30
random_seed = 42
